title: Device Home Screen - Power on Headset while in the app
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app UI does not update to show headset as connected when paired device is powered on while app is open
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is already paired with the Android device via Bluetooth settings.
3. Confirm the headset is currently powered off and the app shows it as disconnected on the Home screen.
4. Power on the headset by pressing and holding the Power button.
5. Observe the Poly Studio Mobile app UI on the Home screen.
expected: The app UI updates to show the headset as connected on the Home screen (e.g., device name appears, connection status changes to 'Connected').
